title: Pugmeowla's Ultor Infinitus
description: Ultor Infinitus brings the very cool suit of Infinity Ultron from "What If?" into Minecraft Palladium 1.20.1
body:
# **Ultor Infinitus**
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/epF6bpveBLo" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/fjS36LlkbVU" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>
**Ultor Infinitus** introduces the **Infinity Ultron Container**, a nanotech suit that can channel the power of all six Infinity Stones. Built for Palladium-based modpacks, it delivers the yearning for this suit from my fans, and a fully visual stone-insertion system.

## Crafting

Craft the **Infinity Ultron Container** using the **Tailoring Bench.** You can view the recipe via JEI.

## How to Use

Equip the container in **either** your:

*   **Chest Armor slot**
*   **Curios Back slot**

Then press your **keybind** to activate the suit and deploy the full Ultron armor.

## Infinity Stone Core Compatibility

Right-click with any Infinity Stone to insert it into the suit.  
Each stone automatically mounts onto the correct position on the body, giving a progressive, visual upgrade as your power grows.

***
